mapper.sql: id, course_name, course_desc, course_tag, course_type, teacher_id, start_date, end_date
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
,
from course
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from course
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into course (id, course_name, course_desc, course_tag, course_type, teacher_id, start_date, end_date, chapters, works, answer) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{chapters,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{works,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{answer,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into course
id,
course_name,
course_desc,
course_tag,
course_type,
teacher_id,
start_date,
end_date,
chapters,
works,
answer,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{courseDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{courseTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{courseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{startDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{chapters,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{works,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{answer,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update course
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_name = #{record.courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_desc = #{record.courseDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_tag = #{record.courseTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_type = #{record.courseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
teacher_id = #{record.teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
start_date = #{record.startDate,jdbcType=DATE},
end_date = #{record.endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
chapters = #{record.chapters,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
works = #{record.works,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
answer = #{record.answer,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update course set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_name = #{record.courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_desc = #{record.courseDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_tag = #{record.courseTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_type = #{record.courseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher_id = #{record.teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, start_date = #{record.startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{record.endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, chapters = #{record.chapters,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, works = #{record.works,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, answer = #{record.answer,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update course set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_name = #{record.courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_desc = #{record.courseDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_tag = #{record.courseTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_type = #{record.courseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher_id = #{record.teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, start_date = #{record.startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{record.endDate,jdbcType=DATE}

update course
course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_desc = #{courseDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_tag = #{courseTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
course_type = #{courseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE},
end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
chapters = #{chapters,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
works = #{works,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
answer = #{answer,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update course set course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_desc = #{courseDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_tag = #{courseTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_type = #{courseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, chapters = #{chapters,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, works = #{works,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, answer = #{answer,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update course set course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_desc = #{courseDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_tag = #{courseTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, course_type = #{courseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
